name: TSMC / 台积电
summary: 台积电是全球领先的纯晶圆代工厂，处于 NVIDIA AI GPU/加速器制造链的核心上游，关键变量包括先进制程、CoWoS/先进封装产能和高端客户资本开支。 / TSMC is a leading pure-play foundry and a core upstream manufacturing node for NVIDIA AI GPUs and accelerators, with advanced nodes, CoWoS packaging capacity, and high-end customer capex as key variables.
summaryZh: 台积电是全球领先的纯晶圆代工厂，处于 NVIDIA AI GPU/加速器制造链的核心上游，关键变量包括先进制程、CoWoS/先进封装产能和高端客户资本开支。
summaryEn: TSMC is a leading pure-play foundry and a core upstream manufacturing node for NVIDIA AI GPUs and accelerators, with advanced nodes, CoWoS packaging capacity, and high-end customer capex as key variables.

updateCadence.最新动态: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每 12 小时
updateCadence.财务与公告: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每日
updateCadence.主营业务: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周
updateCadence.供应链溯源: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周

business.description: 台积电为全球半导体客户提供晶圆制造、先进制程和先进封装相关服务，主要面向高性能计算、智能手机、汽车和物联网等终端需求。 / TSMC provides wafer manufacturing, advanced process technology, and advanced packaging services for global semiconductor customers across HPC, smartphones, automotive, and IoT demand.
business.descriptionZh: 台积电为全球半导体客户提供晶圆制造、先进制程和先进封装相关服务，主要面向高性能计算、智能手机、汽车和物联网等终端需求。
business.descriptionEn: TSMC provides wafer manufacturing, advanced process technology, and advanced packaging services for global semiconductor customers across HPC, smartphones, automotive, and IoT demand.
revenueModel: 工程与光罩服务 / engineering and mask services

segments.name: Total revenue
segments.note: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。
segments.noteZh: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。
segments.noteEn: The batch draft uses only verifiable total revenue; segment revenue split requires later manual annual-report table review.

business.thesis: 与 NVIDIA 的关系主要在制造端：NVIDIA 的 AI 加速器需要先进制程和封装产能，台积电的产能、良率和资本开支直接影响 AI 芯片供给弹性。 / The NVIDIA linkage sits mainly on manufacturing: NVIDIA AI accelerators require leading-edge process and packaging capacity, so TSMC capacity, yield, and capex shape AI chip supply elasticity.
business.thesisZh: 与 NVIDIA 的关系主要在制造端：NVIDIA 的 AI 加速器需要先进制程和封装产能，台积电的产能、良率和资本开支直接影响 AI 芯片供给弹性。
business.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage sits mainly on manufacturing: NVIDIA AI accelerators require leading-edge process and packaging capacity, so TSMC capacity, yield, and capex shape AI chip supply elasticity.
riskNotes: 客户集中与 AI 资本开支周期会影响高端制程利用率。 / Customer concentration and AI capex cycles affect leading-node utilization.
先进封装、EUV 设备和关键材料供应可能成为扩产瓶颈。 / Advanced packaging, EUV tools, and critical materials can constrain expansion.

tiers.title: Key upstream inputs

entities.name: ASML Holding / 阿斯麦
entities.relationship: 向先进晶圆厂供应 EUV/DUV 光刻设备，是先进制程产能的关键上游。
entities.relationshipZh: 向先进晶圆厂供应 EUV/DUV 光刻设备，是先进制程产能的关键上游。
entities.relationshipEn: Supplies EUV/DUV lithography tools to advanced fabs and is a critical upstream node for leading-node capacity.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Applied Materials / 应用材料
entities.relationship: 向晶圆厂供应沉积、刻蚀和材料工程设备。

entities.relationshipEn: Supplies deposition, etch, and materials-engineering tools to fabs.

downstream.thesis: 与 NVIDIA 的关系主要在制造端：NVIDIA 的 AI 加速器需要先进制程和封装产能，台积电的产能、良率和资本开支直接影响 AI 芯片供给弹性。 / The NVIDIA linkage sits mainly on manufacturing: NVIDIA AI accelerators require leading-edge process and packaging capacity, so TSMC capacity, yield, and capex shape AI chip supply elasticity.
downstream.thesisZh: 与 NVIDIA 的关系主要在制造端：NVIDIA 的 AI 加速器需要先进制程和封装产能，台积电的产能、良率和资本开支直接影响 AI 芯片供给弹性。
downstream.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage sits mainly on manufacturing: NVIDIA AI accelerators require leading-edge process and packaging capacity, so TSMC capacity, yield, and capex shape AI chip supply elasticity.

tiers.title: NVIDIA-related demand path

entities.name: NVIDIA Corporation / 英伟达
entities.relationship: 作为 AI 加速器设计公司，其先进芯片制造需求通过晶圆代工和先进封装传导至台积电。
entities.relationshipZh: 作为 AI 加速器设计公司，其先进芯片制造需求通过晶圆代工和先进封装传导至台积电。
entities.relationshipEn: As an AI accelerator designer, its advanced-chip manufacturing demand flows to TSMC through foundry and advanced packaging capacity.
entities.customerRole: AI 芯片设计客户 / 需求来源
entities.customerRoleZh: AI 芯片设计客户 / 需求来源
entities.customerRoleEn: AI chip design customer / demand source

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: NVIDIA 需求直接拉动关键制造或存储产能，是比普通终端客户更紧密的需求来源。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: NVIDIA 需求直接拉动关键制造或存储产能，是比普通终端客户更紧密的需求来源。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: NVIDIA demand directly pulls critical manufacturing or memory capacity, making it a tighter demand source than an ordinary end customer.

tiers.notes: 该层说明目标公司如何作为 NVIDIA 的上游、伙伴、客户或间接需求受益方。

themeExposure.rationale: 先进制程和先进封装直接影响 AI 加速器供给弹性，处于比普通下游客户更靠近供给约束的位置。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 先进制程和先进封装直接影响 AI 加速器供给弹性，处于比普通下游客户更靠近供给约束的位置。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: Advanced nodes and packaging directly shape AI accelerator supply elasticity, placing it closer to the supply bottleneck than ordinary downstream customers.
